_meta.title: JE Regeneration Baseline (per level)
_meta.status: PROPOSED — derived from clean pilot JDs + the confirmed scale (reference.json#/je_framework/scoring). HR to confirm before these regenerated scores become pay grades. Used to rebuild JE for roles flagged je_table_contaminated.
_meta.method: For a contaminated role: take the level baseline 30-item array, keep any role-specific item that can be confirmed from the role's KRs/specs, then set item 30 (Stakeholders) by level from item30_by_level. je_source on the role becomes 'regenerated_proposed'.

item30_by_level._note: Item 30 (Stakeholders Responsibility) uses the stepped scale [1,25,35,45,55,70,80..150]. This mapping is the single biggest driver of the L3>L4 inversion (D7) and MUST be confirmed by HR.

target_total_band._note: Confirmed live ranges (reference.json#/leadership_levels). Regenerated totals should land in-band.

baseline_breakdown._note: Index 0=item1 .. 29=item30. F1/L2/L3 are taken from CLEAN pilot JDs (verified). L1/L4/L5/L6 are PROPOSED placeholders that sum into the band; to be finalised per-role and with HR.

L4.source: proposed — NOTE sum 159 exceeds the L4 band 118-128; item30=45 may be too high for L4. HR to calibrate item30_by_level for L4.

open_question_for_HR: Confirm item30_by_level (esp. L4 vs L5) so regenerated totals respect the level bands without inversion. Current L4 baseline (item30=45) overshoots the 118-128 band — likely item30 for L4 should be ~35 and other items trimmed.
